# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys

MOD = 998244353

def main():
    N = int(sys.stdin.read())
    length = len(str(N))
    
    # We want to compute V_N = N concatenated N times mod MOD
    # V_N = N * 10^{length*(N-1)} + N * 10^{length*(N-2)} + ... + N
    # This can be written as N * (10^{length*(N-1)} + 10^{length*(N-2)} + ... + 1)
    # Which is N * (pow(10, length * N, MOD) - 1) // (pow(10, length, MOD) - 1)
    
    # Compute pow(10, length, MOD)
    pow10_len = pow(10, length, MOD)
    
    # Compute pow(10, length * N, MOD)
    pow10_len_N = pow(10, length * N, MOD)
    
    # Compute numerator: pow10_len_N - 1
    numerator = (pow10_len_N - 1) % MOD
    
    # Compute denominator: pow10_len - 1
    denominator = (pow10_len - 1) % MOD
    
    # Compute modular inverse of denominator
    inv_denominator = pow(denominator, MOD - 2, MOD)
    
    # Compute total value
    total = (N % MOD) * (numerator * inv_denominator % MOD) % MOD
    print(total)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
